description:
Offered: every semester
The course is an introductory survey of the basic elements of physical and historical geology. The class is open to all students. A laboratory is required.
Prerequisite(s): Successful completion of the Quantitative Reasoning requirement. GEOG 1000 is strongly suggested.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): PL, SI
prerequisites: Successful completion of the Quantitative Reasoning requirement. GEOG 1000 is strongly suggested.
